input.usageMessage: Enter your name and start the introduction by pressing 'enter'

5-9.name: earlyMorning
sentences: The day is just beginning.
A new day is waiting ahead.

9-12.name: morning
sentences: You probably have something important coming up.
The day will be long and full of challenges.

12-14.name: midday
sentences: It's lunchtime.
Maybe you're rushing to grab lunch.

14-15.name: earlyAfternoon
sentences: The afternoon is starting.
This is usually the sleepy part of the day.
You might be organizing the rest of your afternoon.

15-19.name: afternoon
sentences: Maybe you could use a short break.
I think a short walk could help this afternoon.
Feel free to grab something to eat if you're getting hungry.

19-22.name: evening
sentences: There is still time to pursue a daily goal.
Maybe you still have a few things left to do.
Take some time for yourself.
I hope you can make good use of what you learned today; the experiences we go through help us understand who we are.

22-2.name: night
sentences: I hope you have a good night.
Only a little energy is still keeping you awake.

2-5.name: lateNight
sentences: It's deep into the night now.
You should probably get some rest.
It's incredibly quiet at this hour.

message.incompleteThought: {thought}, but if you would like to take a look,
message.completeThought: {thought} Anyway, I would also like to mention that
message.siteInfo: inside the 'projects' page you can find the most recent demo websites I have developed, while in the 'about' section you can learn more about my background and contacts.
message.warning: Oh, almost forgot! The website is still under testing, so if you notice any unexpected behavior feel free to let me know by email.
